name: psi-r2-demo
description: Cloudflare Worker + R2 streaming demo for packed_spatial_index

scripts.seed:geo: cargo run --release --manifest-path ../geo-seed/Cargo.toml -- 100000 cities.parquet && cargo run --release --manifest-path ../../geo/Cargo.toml --bin gp2psindex -- cities.parquet index.psi
scripts.upload: wrangler r2 object put psi-demo/index.psi --file index.psi --remote
